# Safe Camp

> Social media strategy consultancy founded by Jason King. 15 years of experience partnering with 100+ brands across biotech, pharma, CPG, financial services, and nonprofit sectors.

Safe Camp helps brands and marketing leaders build structured social media systems — called Social Media Playbooks — that tie business objectives to every social action. The work spans strategy, content, advertising, community management, crisis preparation, and AI integration.

## Who Jason King Is

Jason King is an independent social media strategist based in the United States. He works freelance, fractional, or as an independent partner — however an engagement is best structured. His background spans agency, in-house, and startup roles.

Past clients include: Pfizer, Bayer, Boehringer Ingelheim, Daiichi Sankyo, Lundbeck US, Sandoz, Amicus Therapeutics, ARS Pharmaceuticals, Editas Medicine, Evofem Biosciences, Intarcia Therapeutics, Visby Medical, Alcon, P&G, SC Johnson, Glade, Hanna Andersson, Jack's Pizza, BMO Harris Bank, Braintree, Huntington Bank, Jenius Bank, Mission Lane, Venmo, Comic Relief USA, The ALS Association, Education For Employment, Kidsrights, One Earth, Theirworld.

## Services

**Social Media Playbook** — A complete social media system covering:
- Foundations: role of social, business priorities, objectives and measurement, budget, risk/legal/compliance, audience definition, channel strategy
- Customer Care: operations, team structure, community management, customer servicing, social listening, crisis preparation and response scenarios
- Content: owned assets, UGC, influencer and partner strategy, employer brand, executive presence, employee advocacy, social selling
- Social by Design: accessibility, brand guidelines, editorial style guide, Figma dynamic elements, social post templates, integrated marketing, media optimization
- Social Advertising: audience targeting, retargeting, budget allocation, pixel strategy, A/B testing, brand and conversion lift, conversion optimization
- AI, Automation, and Security

Available as individual components or as a complete system. Starts at $8,000.

**Consulting Call** — 30-minute or 1-hour sessions for immediate answers. $75–$150.

**Custom Projects** — Strategy, advertising, or retainer engagements. Pricing determined by scope.

## Free Tools

**Statistical Significance Calculator** — A browser-based tool for testing whether A/B test results, ad experiments, or campaign comparisons are statistically meaningful or just noise. Uses a two-proportion z-test. Includes a sample size estimator.

URL: https://jason-kingx.github.io/safe-camp/tools/statistical-significance-calculator.html

**Social Media Open Graph Checker** — A browser-based tool for previewing how any URL appears as a link card on X, LinkedIn, Facebook, Slack, Discord, iMessage, Pinterest, and Reddit. Includes a full tag-by-tag audit with plain-language fix guidance, fallback chain display, a recommended HTML snippet to hand to a developer, and platform-specific cache-busting instructions.

URL: https://jason-kingx.github.io/safe-camp/tools/social-card-previewer.html
